tier_intro.refresh: Your vehicle received our Full Refresh detail today. Follow these care notes for the next 7–14 days.
tier_intro.showroom: Your vehicle received our Showroom Reset detail today. Follow these care notes for the next 14–30 days.

maintenance_snippet: Thanks for choosing our Maintenance Wash. Keep the vehicle dry for 24 hours if possible. Avoid automatic brushes for 48 hours. Spot-clean spills promptly.

sections.exterior_base:
Exterior care:
• Avoid automatic car washes with brushes for 7 days.
• Hand-wash or touchless wash only when needed.
• Do not park under trees or sprinklers for 48 hours.
sections.exterior_clay_addon:
Decontamination (clay/iron):
• Avoid wax-stripping soaps for 2 weeks.
• Bird droppings and sap: remove promptly — do not let them bake in sun.
sections.engine_addon:
Engine bay:
• Avoid pressure-washing the bay for 2 weeks.
• If you notice unusual smells or smoke, stop driving and contact us.
sections.interior_base:
Interior care:
• Leave windows cracked 30–60 minutes after service for airflow.
• Blot spills immediately; avoid soaking seats or carpets.
• Use only approved interior cleaners — no harsh solvents on screens or leather.
sections.interior_leather:
Leather/vinyl:
• Condition leather every 60–90 days in sun-heavy climates.
• Wipe spills within 24 hours.
sections.ozone_addon:
Ozone odor treatment:
• Ventilate the cabin 30 minutes before driving.
• Mild ozone scent may linger 24–48 hours — this is normal.
sections.pet_hair_addon:
Pet hair service:
• Use a rubber brush or damp glove between full details.
• Cover seats with a blanket if pets ride regularly.
sections.wheels:
Wheels & tires:
• Avoid curb rash and harsh wheel cleaners for 7 days.
• Tire dressing may sling if over-applied — wipe excess if noticed.
sections.protection:
Protection:
• Hand-wash only for the first 2 weeks after sealant/protection steps.
• Reapply quick detailer between visits if water does not bead.
sections.closing: Questions or concerns? Contact us within 48 hours so we can address them while on-site records are fresh.
